name: 8pc Applique Border Comforter Bedding Set - Threshold™
description:
You'll be adding stylish texture and dimension to the top of your bed layer by layer with the Sanford Comforter Set from Threshold™. This multi-piece bedding set includes a comforter, two decorative pillows, two standard shams, two Euro shams and a solid bedskirt. The bedding set has a soft-filled comforter with tack-stitch quilting and contrast taping detail, along with matching pillow shams with six-inch envelope closures for a refined look. Plus, the bedskirt and two decorative pillows with either taping or embroidered design serve as chic accents to this two-tone bedding set.

We made it better so you can feel better. To keep you safe from harmful substances, this product has been independently tested and certified against a list of over 350 harmful chemicals according to strict STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® guidelines.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
